text:
How problems show up

"Managers are not confronted with problems that are independent of each other, but with dynamic situations that consists of complex systems of changing problems that interact with each other. I call such situations messes.

Managers do not solve problems, they manage messes."

-Russell Ackoff (1979, s. 93)

blocks.text:
